description: I liked using this platform, it was really nice to be a tester in this field and get paid, while checking what is happening with the main parts of the page during the certain actions of ordering for instance.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that anyone without any prior knowledge of QA or Web Development, can jump in the field of testing, gain some valuable experience first handed and even earn something in addition. Case supervisors respond quickly after bug or reproduction has been submitted and user can also gain additional credit, in case they provide for instance in my case an error log, after one app crashed on my mobile device.
cons: Onboarding test can be a real pain for some of the new users, as they are unsure about common mistakes which they make during their first use of this platform. Besides this, it would be nice to see some improvements for testNow application, which is used for reproductions and which tends to freeze from time to time.

review_title: Professional working experience on Test IO - review
description: Working on it for 5 months daily. We have our IOT solution which is integrated with this tool and is very efficient for us
author: Alfiya M.
pros: It has helped me write more io based cases for network security and streamlining them. The test coverage has important implications and it has improved using this tool
cons: Slightly different from other tools, takes some time in comprehension
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for easy user tests and first impressions on your new software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is easy to set up a test. Customer success managers keep improving your test cycles, and you get nearly instant feedback on your software and how it performs overall. Combination of explorative tests and test cases is great to get a high coverage.
cons: You have to work with the tool to avoid duplicates and stuff. Sometimes you get the same testers on every test, but I think is part of community ranking within the test io crowd.

review_title: un outil à avoir pour effectuer des tests de logiciels
description: je le recommande aux chefs d'entreprise
author: atindehou H.
pros: ça me permet de tester tous les logiciels de mon entreprise en un temps records et m'aide à finir avec les bugs
cons: pas assez de fonctionnalités il faudrait revoir ça

review_title: TestIO to test software features In and Out
author: Angeline J.
pros: . Efficient management of test cases and On Demand testing is a great value add. Eexplorative tests and test cases is helps get great coverage.
cons: New users struggle to get themselves onboarded. The documentation for user guidance can be more elaborative and descriptive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Our developers focus on doing what they love; creating, not testing...
description: Thanks to testcloud, our developers focus on doing what they love; creating, not testing. With testcloud we can be sure that our app works on all different devices and with all different software versions. Their testing services are the ideal complement for our QA department, not only improving efficiency but saving hundreds of engineering hours as well. When testcloud's testers find a bug, our engineers receive detailed insights to what causes the bug and where exactly in the app it is located. testcloud has been continually proactive and their always available customer service are happy to help.
author: Rolf Z.
